title: Mac PM test: Require pre-installed rosetta
body:
Previously, the mac podman-machine tests installed rosetta before
executing any tests.  As a best-practice (and because the Macs in CI are
shared) tests should never permanently modify the system.  As of this
commit, the system setup script used for the CI Macs does the rosetta
installation.  Remove the test setup code that installed rosetta and
add a CI-level confirmation that it's been pre-installed.

Ref:
- https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21670
- https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/196

TODO:

- [x] Confirm tests fail on mac w/o rosetta [result](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6334672685236224)
- [X] Confirm mac setup script fails on mac w/o rosetta [result](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4912824634310656)
- [x] Confirm tests pass on mac already setup with rosetta [result](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6159379097976832)
- [x] Confirm tests pass on mac pre-setup (https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/196) with rosetta [result](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6564662479683584)
- [x] Confirm reosetta is installed on entire CI mac worker pool.

comments.body:
> I assume we need to wait until the change is propagated to all worker machines?

You've spotted it exactly, I was just about to add a comment why this PR is still marked as draft :grinning: 

Edit/note to me: All workers should have been recycled w/ necessary (new) setup by 2024-05-23T11:00:00 UTC
@mheon @edsantiago PTAL when you get a chance, this should be ready to go.
Looks like this needs an approval also.
